tasks.label: register-local-dev-runner
args: set -euo pipefail; export HOME="${workspaceFolder}/dev-data"; LOCAL_SERVER_URL="${LOCAL_RUNNER_SERVER_URL:-http://10.0.0.7:5180}"; CONFIG_PATH="$HOME/.charthub-runner/config.json"; PAYLOAD="{\"ttlMinutes\":15}"; mkdir -p "$HOME"; if [[ -f "${workspaceFolder}/.env.local" ]]; then set -a; . "${workspaceFolder}/.env.local"; set +a; LOCAL_SERVER_URL="${LOCAL_RUNNER_SERVER_URL:-$LOCAL_SERVER_URL}"; fi; if [[ -f "$CONFIG_PATH" ]]; then echo "Runner config already exists"; exit 0; fi; TOKEN=""; for i in $(seq 1 30); do RESPONSE=$(curl -fsS -X POST -H "X-Runner-Api-Key: a5c4f05d39705837a865d9cca107137ed0bc79dde61d45fc1a6a8e9803983e9a" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data "$PAYLOAD" "$LOCAL_SERVER_URL/api/v1/runners/registration-tokens" 2>/dev/null || true); if [[ -n "$RESPONSE" ]]; then TOKEN=$(printf '%s' "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"plainToken\", \"\"))"); if [[ -n "$TOKEN" ]]; then break; fi; fi; echo "Waiting for local server before registering runner at $LOCAL_SERVER_URL..."; sleep 2; done; if [[ -z "$TOKEN" ]]; then echo "Failed to obtain local registration token from $LOCAL_SERVER_URL"; exit 1; fi; dotnet run --project "${workspaceFolder}/ChartHub.TranscriptionRunner/ChartHub.TranscriptionRunner.csproj" -- register --server "$LOCAL_SERVER_URL" --token "$TOKEN" --name local-dev-runner --concurrency 1

tasks.label: android-start-emulator
args: if ! ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | grep -q '^emulator-5554\s'; then setsid -f ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_36 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save </dev/null >/tmp/charthub-emulator.log 2>&1; fi

tasks.label: android-wait-for-emulator-5554
args: ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device; until [ "$(${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; until ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done

tasks.label: android-ensure-emulator-5554
args: if ! ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | grep -q '^emulator-5554\s'; then setsid -f ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_36 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save </dev/null >/tmp/charthub-emulator.log 2>&1; fi; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device; until [ "$(${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; until ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done

tasks.label: run-debug-android-phone
args: set -e && cd ${workspaceFolder} && dotnet build ChartHub/ChartHub.csproj -c Debug -f net10.0-android -p:RuntimeIdentifier=android-arm64 -p:AndroidKeyStore=true -p:AndroidSigningKeyAlias=androiddebugkey -p:AndroidSigningKeyPass=android -p:AndroidSigningStorePass=android && ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s R5CY10G7DWP install -r ChartHub/bin/Debug/net10.0-android/android-arm64/com.calahilstudios.charthub-Signed.apk && ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s R5CY10G7DWP shell am start -W -n com.calahilstudios.charthub/crc64921bd654f26924bb.MainActivity && echo 'App launched. Debugger would connect via port 10002'

tasks.label: android-logcat-crash
args: ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 logcat -c; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell monkey -p com.calahilstudios.charthub -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; sleep 4; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 logcat -d | rg -n "FATAL EXCEPTION|AndroidRuntime|Unhandled Exception|com\.calahilstudios\.charthub" -i | tail -200
